source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Crane - Eugene Island Block 182

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Eugene Island Block 182

event.top_event: Hand injury from pinching between rig tongs
actions_taken: Floorhand reported to Rig Medic for treatment
Floorhand evacuated by crew boat for medical evaluation onshore
Laceration sutured and finger splint applied
Floorhand released for restricted work duty on 28 August 2017
event.summary: On 25 August 2017, a Floorhand sustained a left hand thumb injury (laceration and minor fracture with nail avulsion) during drilling operations on a jack-up drilling rig at Eugene Island Block 182. While tripping out of the hole with a casing cutter on drill pipe, the drill crew was using manual rig tongs as a substitute for a broken Iron Roughneck. The floorhand's left hand thumb was pinched between the rig tongs' head and left latch handle when attempting to relatch the tongs from a double latch to single latch position. The injury required evacuation for medical attention.
key_phrases: hazard not addressed in pre-tour safety meeting

hazards.name: Pinch point hazard from rig tongs operation
Equipment substitution without adequate hazard assessment

threats.name: Improper hand placement during rig tongs operation
Inadequate job risk assessment for equipment change-out
Hazards not communicated in pre-tour safety meeting

consequences.name: Hand laceration and fracture to left thumb
Evacuation from rig for medical attention
Restricted work duty and lost productivity

supporting_text: hazards associated with the handling of rig tongs was not addressed in pre-tour safety meetings nor documented in the job risk assessment

controls.name: Job risk assessment for equipment change-out
controls.barrier_role: Identification of hazards when switching from Iron Roughneck to manual rig tongs

supporting_text: inadequate job risk assessment when equipment was changed out from an iron roughneck to manual rig tongs

controls.name: Proper hand placement procedure during rig tongs operation
controls.barrier_role: Prevention of hand pinching during rig tongs latching/unlatching

supporting_text: improper hand placement on the manual rig tongs by the floorhand
his left hand thumb was pinched between the rig tongs' head and left latch handle
